message:
feat(core,cli): add btrfs ZLIB/ZSTD decompression and fix cmd_evidence clippy lints

ffs-core: Add btrfs_decompress() supporting ZLIB (flate2), ZSTD, and
LZO (stub error). Wire decompression into btrfs_read_file() for inline
extents — compressed extents now decompress via the compression_type
field instead of returning UnsupportedFeature. Uses Cow<[u8]> to avoid
unnecessary copies for uncompressed data. Add flate2 and zstd workspace
dependencies to ffs-core/Cargo.toml and flate2 to workspace Cargo.toml.

ffs-cli/cmd_evidence: Fix clippy findings — box MetricsAggregateReport
in the Aggregate variant to reduce enum size, replace nested match
chains in load_metrics_report with map_or_else combinators, extract
print helper functions (print_metrics_header, print_aggregate_metrics_report,
etc.) from the monolithic display function, add #[allow(clippy::derive_partial_eq_without_eq)]
where needed. Close bead bd-0rt0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,6 +75,7 @@ xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
 fuser = "0.16.0"
 zstd = "0.13"
 brotli = "6.0"
+flate2 = "1.0"
 
 # Sibling project dependencies (crates.io; local path overrides via [patch] if needed)
 asupersync = "0.2.5"
